english translation text:
Dua “Allahumma inni ilayka faqirun”
Tofatus Saaemeen p349/p352

Oh Allah, I am coming as a beggar to you. I am coming to you and seek protection from your punishment. Oh Allah, on the day of judgement, please don’t change my name or my form and don’t make the trials difficult for me and don’t let my enemies rejoice at my misfortune. I am seeking refuge with your forgiveness from your punishment and am seeking refuge from your punishment and seek refuge with your pleasure from your anger and seek refuge with you whose praises are so great that no one can find the words to praise you.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Oh Allah: I am in need for You,
and I am fearful of You and seeking Your shelter against Your chastisement.
Oh Allah: (please) do not erase my name,
and do not change my body,
and do not increase my ordeals,
and do not make my enemies rejoice at my misfortune.
I resort to Your pardon against Your punishment,
and I resort to Your mercy against Your chastisement,
and I resort to Your pleasure against Your wrath,
and I resort to You from You
Enormous be the praise of You
You are as exactly as You have praised Yourself,
and above all that which is said about You,
in the name of Your mercy; Oh the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
